violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Paper towel dispenser set up at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026

Raw animal foods (beef) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (potatoes) in the walk-in refrigerator And raw beef patty above deli turkey in the prep unit. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026

(Bleach) was stored with food, equipment, utensils, or single service items. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Bottle relocated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026
Knives were observed stored between prep units. Knives relocated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. Per PIC, PIC is currently working on getting certified. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application printed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. 3-bay sink set up properly. 3-bay sink handout provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024

The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. The menu currently has the majority of items asterisked. New menu to be printed with only the items that can be undercooked (eggs, burgers, etc.) labeled. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024

(Bleach) was stored with food, equipment, utensils, or single service items. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Bottle drained and tested at adequate ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024
Knife was observed stored between prep unit and table. Knife was removed. In use utensils shall be stored on a sanitary surface. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2023

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as spinach) in the 3 door flip top prep unit. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2023

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. New Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2023

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Ranchera, tomatillo and potatoes were placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Items moved to shallow pans to properly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2023

Condensation from the fan of the walk-in refrigerator observed to be dripping on tomatillos. Tomatillos observed with the leaves intact. Produce to be washed before used for food prep. Food to not be stored under fan until condensation is dripped. New Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the spray bottles. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2023
